steps.title: Use the profit formula to identify 2.00x
steps.content:
The profit formula is Profit = Sales Revenue − Fixed Costs.
The equation is $11,000 = 2.00x - 6,500$, where 11,000 is the profit.
Matching the structure: the 2.00x term represents Sales Revenue, and 6,500 is the Fixed Cost.

steps.title: Interpret 2.00x as total revenue
steps.content:
Since $x$ is the number of staplers, $2.00x$ means: \$2.00$ (price per stapler) times $x$ (number of staplers) equals total sales revenue.
This is the total monthly sales revenue from selling $x$ staplers at \$2.00 per unit.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
